allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('.env','utf-8'\); console.log\('Lines:', c.split\('\\n'\).length\); c.split\('\\n'\).forEach\(l => { const t=l.trim\(\); if\(!t||t.startsWith\('#'\)\)return; const eq=t.indexOf\('='\); if\(eq<0\)return; console.log\(t.slice\(0,eq\).trim\(\)+': OK'\); }\)")
